mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.organisation_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, company_name, legal_name, registration_number, gst_number, pan_number, domain, active, logo_url, favicon_url, primary_color, copyright_text, founded_year, primary_email, support_email, primary_phone, support_phone, website_url, address_line1, address_line2, city, state, pincode, country, currency, timezone, locale, date_format, country_code, facebook_url, twitter_url, instagram_url, linkedin_url, youtube_url, created_at ) SELECT o.id, o.tenant, NOW(), o.company_name, o.legal_name, o.registration_number, o.gst_number, o.pan_number, o.domain, o.active, b.logo_url, b.favicon_url, b.primary_color, b.copyright_text, b.founded_year, c.primary_email, c.support_email, c.primary_phone, c.support_phone, c.website_url, a.address_line1, a.address_line2, a.city, a.state, a.pincode, a.country, l.currency, l.timezone, l.locale, l.date_format, l.country_code, s.facebook_url, s.twitter_url, s.instagram_url, s.linkedin_url, s.youtube_url, o.created_time FROM hm_organisation.organisation o LEFT JOIN hm_organisation.organisation_branding b ON o.id = b.organisation_id LEFT JOIN hm_organisation.organisation_contact c ON o.id = c.organisation_id LEFT JOIN hm_organisation.organisation_address a ON o.id = a.organisation_id LEFT JOIN hm_organisation.organisation_locale l ON o.id = l.organisation_id LEFT JOIN hm_organisation.organisation_social s ON o.id = s.organisation_id
